changeSet.author: Manh
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO `tradex-configuration`.t_scope (name, uri_pattern, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at, forward_type, forward_data) VALUES ('E_KYC_E_CONTRACT_STATUS', 'post:/api/v1/ekyc-admin/eContractStatus', NULL, NULL, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), 'CONNECTION', '{"uri": "/api/v1/ekyc-admin/eContractStatus", "service": "ekyc-admin", "forwardType": "SERVICE"}');

INSERT INTO `tradex-configuration`.t_scope_scope_group_map (scope_id, scope_group_id) SELECT ts.id, tsg.id FROM `tradex-configuration`.t_scope ts, `tradex-configuration`.t_scope_group tsg WHERE ts.name = 'E_KYC_E_CONTRACT_STATUS' AND tsg.scope_group_name = 'PUBLIC';
